title: ononis serrata subsp. cossoniana
intro: Ononis serrata subsp. cossoniana, also known as the prickly restharrow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Ononis, characterized by its hairy stems and sharp spines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Ononis serrata subsp. cossoniana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts have been used in various forms to harness its medicinal properties.
